free_text: Verification of high-energy transport codes on the
basis of activation data.
Decay-data
ITEP U-10 synchrotron was used.
LAHET, CEM95, CEM2K, CASCADE, INUCL and YIELDX
codes-simulated yields.
No detailed description on source of
uncertainties
*By authors*. It should be noted that the ITEP
activation data at 0.5 GeV were measured specifically
for our comparison of the two methods.
Pb-208, enrichment 97.2%
